metadata.description: Information Logistics plugin marketplace. Eight plugins across engineering and design: process discipline, JTBD validation, sizing, structural audit, agent orchestration, type scales, brand audits, data viz audits.

plugins.name: claude-pip
plugins.description: Performance Improvement Plan for Claude. Five triggers covering a rule's full lifecycle: CLAUDE PIP / LOCAL PIP capture, OFF THE PIP removes, PRUNE THE PIP audits (default verdict keep), PROMOTE THE PIP graduates stable rules to canonical homes (user picks which). Every rule wrapped in HTML-comment markers.

plugins.name: tufte-love
plugins.description: Tufte-style audits, redesigns, and reviews for data visualizations, dashboards, and quantitative UI.

plugins.name: jtbd-prd
plugins.description: Validate customer need before you build. Produces a Job Article that functions as PRD framing, grounded in Jobs-to-be-Done evidence.

plugins.name: estimatrix
plugins.description: Two-axis sizing rubric for effort AND complexity. Effort as T-shirt (XS / S / M / L / XL / XXL); complexity as low / medium / high. Runs active conversational intake (jtbd-style) to fill missing scope and success criteria before sizing. Applies Karpathy's four code rules: state assumptions, ask if ambiguous, prefer simpler scope, require a success criterion.

plugins.name: learn2kern
plugins.description: Typography skill. Generates modular type scales (eight named ratios from Minor Second to Golden Ratio) with BODY and HEADINGS as separate token families, line-height bands, letter-spacing per band. Emits CSS custom properties and Tailwind theme.fontSize. Color slots reference atomic-brand tokens. Runs conversational intake when inputs are missing.

plugins.name: semantic-organization
plugins.description: Meta-skill that governs how every skill is structured. Codifies the Anthropic Agent Skills directory convention (skills/<name>/SKILL.md flat — no plugin wrapper), folder roles, naming rules, migration triggers. Scaffolds, audits, recommends migrations.

plugins.name: atomic-brand
plugins.description: Audits web projects against atomic design discipline and brand-token coherence. Detects token violations, atomic hierarchy drift, naming by appearance, scattered components, brand drift, and scale violations. Emits a scored audit plus a refactor plan or build-out plan. Failover chain: explicit tokens → image parse → URL scrape. Web medium first; native and other mediums spin out as sibling skills.

plugins.name: github-issues-kanban
plugins.description: Agent orchestration substrate built on GitHub Issues + Projects V2. Defines three concurrency primitives (access lock with TTL, dependency chain DAG, comment-based event bus) so multiple agents can claim and work tasks in parallel without conflict. Includes audit, triage, generate, list, and dispatch modes. Confirm-first by default; YOLO bypass available. Four archetype templates: personal-todo, writing-pipeline, oss-triage, sprint-planning. Protocol is agent-agnostic.
